text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Nikkei Shinshun Hai. Trying to
break free from her half-hearted self, Mejiro
Palmer shows her party girl side in full force.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is in an uproar. Boasting that she's
going to win over all the fans still on the fence
about her new party mood, she heads into the
race.
